project_type: Node.js Turborepo monorepo - Express API + React SPA + BullMQ workers
build_system: Turborepo with npm workspaces. `turbo build` runs tsc across packages. Workers build has known test-file TS errors (rootDir issue). API and web build/test fine.
test_framework: Vitest for all packages. API uses supertest with mock prisma (via vi.mock). Web uses @testing-library/react with happy-dom. Test files sit next to source files as `*.test.ts(x)`.
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npx turbo test --filter=@leadgenius/api` (414 tests passing baseline). 2. Run `npx turbo test --filter=@leadgenius/web` (91 tests passing baseline). 3. Run `npx tsc --noEmit` in apps/api and apps/web to check types.
snapshot_or_generated_files: Prisma client generated via `npx prisma generate` in apps/api. Migrations in apps/api/prisma/migrations/ are version-controlled.
setup_instructions: 1. npm install (root). 2. npx prisma generate (apps/api). 3. Tests run without DB (all mocked).
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon available. No PostgreSQL/Redis running. All tests mock external services (Prisma, Redis, Nodemailer, Twilio). Build validation is via TypeScript compilation (tsc --noEmit) and test runs.
contribution_requirements: Per AGENTS.md: strict TypeScript, no `any` without comment. API routes: validate -> query -> respond. Consistent response format { data, meta?, error? }. Frontend: TanStack Query for data, React Hook Form + Zod for forms. Loading/empty/error states on every page. Skeleton loaders preferred over spinners. Tailwind utility classes only. Files: kebab-case.ts, Components: PascalCase.tsx.
key_patterns: API route pattern: Router() with try/catch, validate middleware, prisma queries, consistent JSON response. Frontend page pattern: useQuery for data, useMutation for actions, ui components from components/ui/index.tsx. Store: Zustand with persist. Schemas/types in packages/shared. Automation engine already has event-bus, step processor, condition evaluator. BullMQ workers process jobs with concurrency settings.
directory_structure: Root: turbo.json, docker-compose.yml, package.json. apps/api: Express server with Prisma, BullMQ queues, services (email, whatsapp, automation-engine, event-bus, AI), routes, middleware. apps/web: React 19 + Vite, pages/, components/ (ui/, layout/, auth/), store/, hooks/, lib/. apps/workers: BullMQ workers (campaign, send, AI). packages/shared: types/ and schemas/ (Zod).
